rationale: Educ. Code §21.4555 governs civics training programs for teachers and administrators. It has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: To facilitate the teaching of curriculum consistent with Sections 28.002(h-2) and 28.0022, the commissioner shall develop and make available civics training programs for teachers and administrators.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
